use_cases: Displaying content in a contained card format for dashboards and layouts
Building reusable card-based UI systems with header, content, and footer sections
Creating form containers with consistent styling across applications
Displaying statistics, metrics, or data summaries in organized layouts
Serving as foundation components for building modals, alerts, and other overlay patterns
ai_summary: A set of primitive card components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) following shadcn/ui patterns. These atomic UI building blocks provide a consistent card container system with forwardRef support for flexible composition. Built with Tailwind CSS utility classes for rounded corners, shadows, and typography, making them ideal foundation components for dashboards, forms, and data display layouts across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms.
